templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='reserve_spot.html', context={'spots': available_spots, 'selected': None, 'success': True, 'booked_spot': spot, 'total': total, 'reservation_id': reservation_id} ) @app.get('/admin', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def admin_dashboard(request: Request): total_revenue = sum(p['amount'] for p in db['payments']) available = sum(1 for s in 'Reserved') enriched_res = [] for r in db['reservations']: spot = next((s for s in db['parking_spots'] if s['id'] == r['spot_id']), {}) pay = next((p for p in db['payments'] if p['reservation_id'] == request=request, name='admin_dashboard.html', context={'spots': db['parking_spots'], 'reservations': enriched_res, 'total_revenue': total_revenue, 'available': available, 'occupied': occupied, 'reserved': reserved} ) @app.get('/api/spots') async def api_spots(): return {'spots': db['parking_spots']} @app.post('/api/spots/reserve') async def api_reserve(data: dict): return {'status': str(uuid.uuid4())[:6]} @app.get('/api/admin/dashboard') async def api_admin_dashboard(): return {'spots': db['parking_spots'], 'reservations': db['reservations'], 'payments': db['payments']} "},
